task_updates.executor_notes: Created `useExternalDrop` containing the coordinator-based dragover, dragleave, and drop adapter. It imports `inferDragKind` from `drop-position.ts`, accepts `coordinator` rather than `indicatorRef`, and uses `registerGenerationAsset`, `uploadImageGeneration`, and `handleAssetDrop` from `useAssetManagement` for drop handling. `useTimelineEditing` now consumes the extracted hook instead of carrying the adapter inline. `npx tsc --noEmit` passes, and `rg -n "onTimelineDragOver|onTimelineDragLeave|onTimelineDrop|externalDragFrameRef|latestExternalDragRef|latestExternalPositionRef|clearExternalDragState" src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useTimelineEditing.ts` returns only the exported surface plus the hook wiring, not the old implementation.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: `useExternalDrop` now receives `coordinator` in its args, imports `inferDragKind` from `drop-position.ts`, and routes drop behavior through the extracted `useAssetManagement` callbacks (`registerGenerationAsset`, `uploadImageGeneration`, `handleAssetDrop`). `rg -n "coordinator|inferDragKind|registerGenerationAsset|uploadImageGeneration|handleAssetDrop|indicatorRef|getDropPosition|getTimelineDomNodes" src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useExternalDrop.ts` confirms the new dependency shape, and there is no raw `indicatorRef` usage or local `inferDragKind` copy in the extracted hook.
